IF short_score <= 25 THEN 'Low' ELSE 
IF short_score <= 50 THEN 'Moderate' ELSE 
IF short_score <= 75 THEN 'High' ELSE
IF short_score >75 THEN 'Extreme'
Remarks: Threshold label from shortScore: Low / Moderate / High / Extreme. Exact thresholds TBD.
